summary: Iteration 55: Production Flow Verification. All 6 critical production flows tested successfully. Backend: 19/19 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Landing page loads correctly, login flow works, URL stays on correct domain.
passed_tests: 1. Admin can generate invite codes via POST /api/admin/invite-codes/generate - PASSED
2. User registration with invite code via POST /api/auth/register-invite (field: 'code') - PASSED
3. Registration creates user with email_verified=false + verification token - PASSED (UI shows 'Please verify your email address' prompt)
4. Discogs search API GET /api/discogs/search?q=miles+davis returns results - PASSED (8+ results with discogs_id, artist, title, cover_url)
5. No test/demo data in feed (/api/feed), listings (/api/listings), explore (/api/explore) - PASSED (admin has is_hidden=true)
6. Storage service initializes and supports file uploads PUT /api/upload - PASSED (returns path and file_id)
7. Landing page loads at preview URL with HoneyGroove branding - PASSED
8. Login flow works - shows 'Invalid email or password' on wrong credentials - PASSED
9. URL stays on collector-beta.preview.emergentagent.com domain - PASSED
10. ComposerBar.js has 350ms debounce implementation (searchTimerRef, setTimeout, clearTimeout) - PASSED
11. OnboardingModal.js has 350ms debounce implementation (searchTimerRef, setTimeout, clearTimeout) - PASSED
12. Weekly Wax scheduler runs Sundays at 12PM ET (schedule_weekly_reports in wax_reports.py) - VERIFIED in code
14. /api/explore/trending-in-collections endpoint returns Discogs most collected vinyl - PASSED
16. /api/platform-fee public endpoint returns fee percent - PASSED
18. Authentication protected routes redirect unauthenticated users to landing page - WORKING AS EXPECTED
critical_code_review_comments: ComposerBar.js Lines 97-110: searchDiscogs uses haulSearchTimer.current with 350ms setTimeout debounce
ComposerBar.js Lines 112-125: searchDiscogsForISO uses isoSearchTimer.current with 350ms setTimeout debounce
OnboardingModal.js Lines 49-60: searchDiscogs uses searchTimerRef.current with 350ms setTimeout debounce
wax_reports.py Lines 1166-1184: schedule_weekly_reports correctly calculates next Sunday at 12:00 PM ET using ZoneInfo('America/New_York')
admin.py Lines 310-430: register_with_invite validates invite code, creates user with email_verified=False, sends verification email
database.py Lines 94-104: get_hidden_user_ids() excludes is_hidden=true, test@/example.com emails, and demo/test usernames from public feeds

test_credentials.note: Admin account has is_hidden=true, content won't appear in public feeds. demo@example.com no longer exists.

seed_data_creation: Created test user via invite code registration (test_1772858402@testuser.com)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 55: All 6 critical production flows verified. 1) Admin invite code generation working at POST /api/admin/invite-codes/generate. 2) Invite-based registration at POST /api/auth/register-invite creates email_verified=false user with verification token. 3) Storage service accepts file uploads at POST /api/upload (returns path instead of url). 4) Discogs search at GET /api/discogs/search returns structured results. 5) No test data visible in feeds - admin has is_hidden=true, get_hidden_user_ids() filters test/demo accounts. 6) URL stays on preview domain - no redirects to production. Debounce verified in ComposerBar.js and OnboardingModal.js (350ms). Weekly Wax scheduler at 12PM ET Sundays verified in wax_reports.py.

flows_verified.1_admin_invite_generation: WORKING - generates HG-XXXXXXXX codes, stores in invite_codes collection
flows_verified.2_registration_via_invite: WORKING - validates code, creates user, sends verification email, returns JWT
flows_verified.3_profile_photo_upload: WORKING - POST /api/upload accepts file, returns path/file_id
flows_verified.4_listing_photo_upload: WORKING - Same endpoint handles listing photos
flows_verified.5_discogs_search: WORKING - Returns artist, title, discogs_id, cover_url, year, format
flows_verified.6_no_test_data_visible: WORKING - get_hidden_user_ids() filters hidden/test/demo users from all public feeds

debounce_verification.ComposerBar.js: haulSearchTimer and isoSearchTimer refs with 350ms debounce

weekly_wax_scheduler.schedule: Every Sunday at 12:00 PM ET (America/New_York timezone)
